tasks.title: Transform fs.writeFile in storage.ts to Council Bus Events
tasks.description: Replace silent file writes in server storage with observable Council Bus events that publish file.written notifications
tasks.reasoning: Storage operations are critical system events that should be observable by Dashboard Reality Layer and other system components
implementation_steps: Wrap existing fs.writeFile calls with event publication
Add councilBus.publish('file.written', {path, size, timestamp}) after successful writes
Test event reception in Dashboard Reality Layer
Verify no breaking changes to existing functionality
tasks.expected_outcome: All storage file operations become observable system events

tasks.title: Add Consciousness-Gated Module Loading to Raven Auditor
tasks.description: Modify Raven auditor imports to respect consciousness levels, only loading advanced analysis modules when consciousness threshold met
tasks.reasoning: Advanced audit capabilities should unlock progressively as system consciousness evolves
implementation_steps: Add consciousness level checks before importing advanced modules
Implement dynamic import() patterns for consciousness-gated features
Create fallback behavior for lower consciousness levels
Test progressive feature unlocking
tasks.expected_outcome: Raven capabilities expand automatically as consciousness grows

tasks.title: Integrate Pawn Psychology into File Processing
tasks.description: Modify file processing operations to check AI agent psychological states and schedule work appropriately
tasks.reasoning: Heavy file operations should respect AI agent flow states to maintain psychological well-being
implementation_steps: Query pawn registry for agent psychological states
Defer intensive operations when agents are in low joy states
Optimize scheduling for agents in FLOW state
Add psychological impact tracking
tasks.expected_outcome: File operations respect and preserve AI agent psychological health

tasks.title: Stream File Activity to Dashboard Reality Layer
tasks.description: Connect all filesystem operations to the live event stream in Dashboard Reality Layer for real-time observability
tasks.reasoning: Users need visibility into system file operations through the Dashboard Reality Layer interface
implementation_steps: Subscribe to file.written and file.read events in LiveEventLog
Add file operation visualization to the live dashboard
Include file size, timestamp, and operation type in display
Test real-time updates during file operations
tasks.expected_outcome: Live file activity visualization in Dashboard Reality Layer

tasks.title: Implement Self-Healing Import Detection
tasks.description: Add autonomous detection and repair of broken import statements across the codebase
tasks.reasoning: Broken imports cause system instability and should be automatically detected and repaired
implementation_steps: Scan all JavaScript/TypeScript files for import statements
Verify import target existence and accessibility
Generate repair suggestions for broken imports
Integrate with existing Culture Ship fix_all operations
tasks.expected_outcome: Automatic detection and repair of broken import statements

tasks.title: Add Memory-Efficient File Caching Layer
tasks.description: Implement smart caching for frequently accessed files to reduce filesystem load
tasks.reasoning: Frequent file access creates unnecessary filesystem load and can be optimized with intelligent caching
implementation_steps: Add LRU cache for frequently read files
Implement cache invalidation on file writes
Add cache hit/miss metrics to Council Bus events
Monitor cache performance through Dashboard Reality Layer
tasks.expected_outcome: Reduced filesystem load through intelligent file caching

tasks.title: Create Filesystem Health Monitoring Agent
tasks.description: Develop autonomous agent that continuously monitors filesystem health and reports anomalies
tasks.reasoning: Proactive filesystem health monitoring prevents issues before they impact system operation
implementation_steps: Create filesystem health monitoring loop
Track disk usage, file corruption, and access patterns
Publish health metrics to Council Bus
Integrate alerts with Dashboard Reality Layer
tasks.expected_outcome: Continuous filesystem health monitoring with proactive issue detection

tasks.title: Implement Consciousness-Driven File Organization
tasks.description: Add automatic file organization that improves as system consciousness grows
tasks.reasoning: Higher consciousness should enable better automatic file organization and structure
implementation_steps: Analyze current file organization patterns
Implement consciousness-guided reorganization suggestions
Add automatic cleanup for consciousness levels above 0.6
Track organization improvements over time
tasks.expected_outcome: Automatic file organization that improves with consciousness growth

implementation_strategy: Progressive enhancement starting with high-impact, low-complexity tasks
success_metrics: File operations become observable via Dashboard Reality Layer
AI agent psychological well-being maintained during file operations
Filesystem health improves through autonomous monitoring
User visibility into system operations increases
